HideContinueButtons.title: Hide Continue Buttons
HideContinueButtons.description: If true, the warning page continue buttons are hidden.

HideReportButton.title: Hide Report Button
HideReportButton.description: If true, the warning page report button is hidden.

DisableClearAllowedWebsites.title: Disable Clear Allowed Websites
DisableClearAllowedWebsites.description: If true, the clear allowed websites button is disabled.

LockProtectionOptions.title: Lock Protection Options
LockProtectionOptions.description: If true, provider toggles and provider settings are locked in the options page.

DisableResetButtons.title: Disable Reset Buttons
DisableResetButtons.description: If true, reset actions in the settings page are disabled.

DisableThirdPartyIntegrations.title: Disable Third-Party Integrations
DisableThirdPartyIntegrations.description: If true, third-party direct integrations are disabled and cannot be enabled from settings.

MetaDefenderApiKey.title: MetaDefender API Key
MetaDefenderApiKey.description: Managed API key for the MetaDefender integrations.

HideProtectionOptions.title: Hide Protection Options
HideProtectionOptions.description: If true, protection options are hidden from the popup and options page.

AlphaMountainEnabled.title: AlphaMountain Web Protection Enabled
AlphaMountainEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for AlphaMountain Web Protection.

BforeAIPreCrimeEnabled.title: BforeAI PreCrime Enabled
BforeAIPreCrimeEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for BforeAI PreCrime.

AdGuardDNSEnabled.title: AdGuard DNS Enabled
AdGuardDNSEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for AdGuard DNS.

ControlDEnabled.title: Control D Enabled
ControlDEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Control D.

RedFlagDomainsEnabled.title: Red Flag Domains Enabled
RedFlagDomainsEnabled.description: Managed enabled state for Red Flag Domains.
